texto: Each malevolence has a cousin that heals it. I fancy Hurtsickle and Heartsease as herbal enemies –weeds growing in reach of one another
autor: the bite and the balm in balance.
explicacao: Citação de the bite and the balm in balance. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Each malevolence has a cousin that heals it. I fancy Hurtsickle and Heartsease as herbal enemies …” articula reflexao, jalina-mhyana, malevolence em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
